content: We can add a configurable Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM) as a plug-and-play harness component to the OpenClaw autonomous coding agent framework to drive self-directed exploration of unguided code improvement tasks, where the ICM rewards the agent for discovering novel edge cases or refactoring opportunities that are not captured by explicit task validation loops.
source_topics: agent harness components ACP openclaw autonomous agent framework
trigger_topic: agent harness components ACP openclaw autonomous agent framework
